title: Verify attributable financial history
preconditions: Representative active transactions, statement-authoritative replacements, evidence links, deterministic and owner Reconciliation Decision, category hierarchy and moves, category/pool allocations, payment attribution, transfer/refund relationships, archived identities, and correction cases.
steps: Void and supersede transactions; apply statement corrections; reparent categories; correct evidence decisions, category, pool, payment attribution, and financial relationships; query history-inclusive projections and backup state.
expected: Original facts, hierarchy versions, evidence, decisions, relationships, and assignments remain attributable; only explicit replacement/carry-forward events affect current projections; no correction overwrites or silently moves state; exact actuals count one active event.
